summary: Fixed rejected work_4 behavior by removing runner-level final video synthesis. Updated ensureFinalVideoMp4 to strictly verify presence of final_video artifact and fail when missing, preserving orchestration-only constraints and preventing artifact mutation by the runner. Kept deterministic pipeline_report generation and failure reporting paths, and updated tests to reflect the corrected contract: default stages/CLI now fail when final_video is absent, while successful pipelines must produce final_video via stages. Report tests now validate existence-only verification and no mutation semantics. Full test suite passes.
